video.title: Uphill sprint leads to photo finish in Stage 3 of Tour de France

all_candidates.title: Uphill sprint leads to photo finish in Stage 3 of Tour de France
Tour de France 2017: Stage 4 ends in chaos with two massive crashes | NBC Sports
Geraint Thomas wins Stage 1 Time Trial at 2017 Tour de France
